title: athyrium nitidulum
intro: Athyrium nitidulum, also known as the silver lady fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Athyrium nitidulum include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and act as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Athyrium nitidulum can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
